element.hint: Opacity of flow links between nodes (0-1)
element.label: Link Opacity
element.name: link_opacity

element.hint: Display text labels on each node
element.label: Show Node Labels
element.name: show_labels

element.hint: Alignment strategy for nodes: left, right, center, justify
element.label: Node Alignment
element.name: node_alignment

element.hint: How links are colored: source node color, target node color, or gradient
element.label: Link Color Mode
element.name: link_color_mode

element.hint: Width of each node bar in pixels
element.label: Node Width
element.name: node_width

element.hint: Font size for node labels in pixels
element.label: Label Font Size
element.name: label_font_size

element.hint: Vertical spacing between nodes in the same column in pixels
element.label: Node Padding
element.name: node_padding
